stemHtml: A flight crew, after getting enough rest, has to fly during the night time. What is true about their performance?

options.a: The pilots performance will be affected by circadian rhythm and be the lowest at 02:00.
options.b: The pilots performance will be affected by circadian rhythm and be the lowest at 5:00-6:00.
options.c: Their performance is not affected by their circadian rhythm.
options.d: The time their performance will start to reduce significantly cannot be determined.
